meaning: 詹谢普尔[印度东北部城市]
examples: Some years later we moved to Rourkela, a small mining town in the north east, near Jamshedpur.
At the Sonnet, Jamshedpur travelers can indulge their palates with a distinct variety of dining options, day or night.
Consider Jamshedpur, the home of Tata Steel and perhaps the world's most successful company town.
On March 3rd thousands marched through the streets of Jamshedpur, as they do every year, to celebrate his birthday.
In Jamshedpur men in thick denim shirts and hard hats watch as molten steel is poured from a gigantic ladle.
